name: gate 2 REJECT_AND_LOOP increments iteration_count and returns next_state=BUILDER
description: Verifies fireGate Gate 2 REJECT_AND_LOOP path: gate_responder returns REJECT_AND_LOOP, fireGate delegates to tryAdvanceForLoopBack which increments iteration_count (0→1) and appends LOOP_BACK audit row. Returned next_state=BUILDER, escalated=false. iteration_count in persisted graph is 1. Contract: §7.3 REJECT_AND_LOOP + §11.2 Path B (count 0 < CAP 5 → advance).
